message:
fix(engine): overflow-safe arithmetic and fail-closed constraint evaluation

Replace unchecked `.sum()` aggregations with `saturating_add` folds across
compression_residual_gate (total_restoration_overhead_us, net_memory_change_bytes,
build_pass_result totals) and rollback_safemode_synthesizer (total_improvement)
to prevent silent overflow wrapping on large artifact sets.

Harden rollback constraint evaluation to fail-closed: missing constraint
check results now default to `false` instead of `true`, and soft-violation
counting now correctly excludes hard constraints by joining checks with
their constraint definitions rather than counting all failures.

- compression_residual_gate: 7 sum→fold conversions (u64 and i64)
- rollback_safemode_synthesizer: 1 sum→fold conversion, fail-closed
  default for missing check results, soft-only violation counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
